data.content: Removed all prompt-guidance commands from scripts/install.sh (176 lines: PROMPT_TEMPLATE_FILE/PROMPT_MARKER vars, append_guidance_prompt, remove_guidance_prompt, prompt_usage, detect_repo_prompt_profile, resolve_prompt_template_for_profile, prompt_cmd functions, prompt case in main(), help line, tip string) and scripts/setup.sh (100 lines: _PROMPT_MARKER var, _resolve_prompt_template, _append_guidance_prompt_to_file, _prompt_guidance_wizard functions, wizard call in foolery_setup). All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 2018 tests, build).
